name: WOLTERS KLUWER NAM. EO-12
summary: Wolters Kluwer is a global provider of professional information, software solutions, and services for the healthcare, tax and accounting, governance, risk & compliance, and legal & regulatory sectors. The company helps professionals make critical decisions effectively by providing them with deep domain expertise along with specialized technology. Wolters Kluwer is headquartered in Alphen aan den Rijn, Netherlands.
